title: SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27 - Overview

detail.title: SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27 - Overview
detail.short_info: SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27 has been declared by BSEB for Simultala Awasiya Vidyalaya admission. Check mains result, merit list PDF for 120 seats and login link at biharsimultala.com.

content.text: SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27 has been declared, and candidates can check their Simultala Awasiya Vidyalaya Class 6 mains result and merit list online through the official website biharsimultala.com.

sections.heading: SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27 - Overview

content.text: Below is a quick overview table you can use near the top of your article for users and rich results:

rows: Simultala Awasiya Vidyalaya (SAV) Class 6 Main Entrance Exam 2026
Mains result and merit list declared
Medical test and final admission formalities

sections.heading: Direct Result Link - SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27

content.text: For users with navigational intent, provide direct, clearly labeled links:

items: SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27 Login: Click Here
Merit List / Result Notice: Available under the link titled “SIMULTALA MAINS ENTRANCE EXAM, 2026 CLASS VI RESULT” on biharsimultala.com.

content.text: Explain that candidates can either open the merit list PDF and search their roll number or, if available, log in with registered credentials to view marks and status.

sections.heading: How to Check SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27 Online

content.text: This section targets informational + navigational intent and should be step-by-step.
Check Result via Merit List PDF

items: Visit the official website biharsimultala.com in your browser.
On the home page, find and click the link “SIMULTALA MAINS ENTRANCE EXAM, 2026 CLASS VI RESULT” or similar mains result notice.
A PDF containing the list of selected candidates for Class 6 will open.
Press Ctrl+F on desktop or use the search option on mobile and enter your roll number or name.
If your details appear in the list, you have been selected for Class 6 admission at Simultala Awasiya Vidyalaya for session 2026-27.

content.text: Check Result Using Login (If Enabled)

items: Open the login page: https://www.biharsimultala.com/login.
Enter the registered mobile number or login credentials as asked on the page.
Click on the link for “SAV Class 6 Main Exam Result 2026” or “Scorecard”.
View your individual result and download or print it for future use.

sections.heading: SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Exam 2026 - Key Details

content.text: This context helps you rank better in Google Search, Discover, and AI Overviews by answering what, when, and how.
Exam Pattern and Total Seats

items: The SAV Class 6 mains exam was conducted in two shifts on 7 January 2026.
The mains examination comprised two papers of 150 marks each, making a total of 300 marks.
Questions were asked from the Class 5 syllabus prescribed by the Bihar Government, suitable for entry into Class 6.
For the 2026-27 session, a total of 120 students have been selected for Class 6 seats at Simultala Awasiya Vidyalaya.

content.text: Selection Process for SAV Bihar Class 6 Admission 2026-27
You can briefly narrate the selection workflow:

items: Stage 1 - Prelims Exam: BSEB conducted the SAV Class 6 prelims exam and released the prelims result in PDF format, shortlisting 1,200 students (600 boys and 600 girls) for the mains.
Stage 2 - Mains Exam: Qualified candidates appeared in the mains exam held on 7 January 2026 at designated centers.
Stage 3 - Mains Result & Merit List: Based on performance in the mains exam, BSEB has now released the list of 120 selected students for admission to Class 6.
Stage 4 - Medical Test & Admission: Selected candidates must undergo medical examination and complete document verification before final admission.

content.text: You can also add a short timeline line like: “Prelims → Mains → Result → Medical → Admission”.

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for SAV Bihar Class 6 Admission 2026-27

content.text: This section addresses informational intent for future aspirants while staying fact-based.

items: Only those students who had appeared in the prelims and were declared qualified in the SAV Class 6 prelims result 2026 were allowed to sit for the mains exam.

The educational qualification, age limits and other conditions for this admission cycle were mentioned in the official SAV Class 6 admission notification/prospectus issued by BSEB for session 2026-27.
Candidates whose names have appeared in the final mains merit list are provisionally eligible for admission, subject to medical fitness and document verification as per rules.

content.text: If you want to add exact age criteria, pull them from the original notification and clearly attribute, avoiding assumptions.

sections.heading: Documents Required After SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result

content.text: This is transactional / informational and very useful for parents.
Typically required documents include (as per board and school instructions):

items: Printout of the mains result / merit list page showing the candidate’s name and roll number.
Original and photocopy of prelims and mains admit cards.
Birth certificate and previous school transfer certificate / marksheet.
Category certificate (SC / ST / OBC / EWS) if applicable, issued by competent authority.
Domicile certificate of Bihar, if required for state quota residential school admissions.
Recent passport-size photographs and any other document mentioned in the counselling or medical examination notice.

content.text: Phrase this as “students are generally required to carry the following documents, as per official guidelines” to avoid overclaiming.

items: The SAV Bihar Class 6 Mains Result 2026-27 list is provisional; admission will be confirmed only after medical fitness and verification of original documents.
Selected candidates and parents should regularly check biharsimultala.com and relevant BSEB portals for detailed schedules of medical tests, reporting dates and venue details.
Students must report on the specified date and time; failure to report may lead to cancellation of candidature as per board rules.
It is advisable to keep multiple photocopies of all documents and carry the original set safely at the time of admission.
